plain_english_purpose: Notifies the applicant that USCIS has approved an immigration petition or application.
required_actions: Keep the notice with immigration records
Follow any instructions included in the notice
common_confusions: Approval notice is different from a visa.
Approval notice alone may not authorize travel.
Approval does not replace other immigration documents.
notes_for_app_design: Highlight validity dates, approval type, receipt number, and any attached I-94.
